articles.title: Republican lawmaker proposes prediction markets insider trading ban, not including White House officials
articles.description: The bill did not specifically bar members of the US Congress from using the platforms or making sports bets, but prohibited policy wagers.

articles.title: Schwab to join prediction markets race with S&P 500 event-based options: WSJ
articles.description: The planned offering would let customers bet on index moves as Coinbase and Robinhood expand in the sector.

articles.title: Bitcoin traders expect new lows but data cautions against overly bearish bias
articles.description: A concentrated liquidity pocket below $59,000 raises the chance of a Bitcoin price sell-off to new 2026 lows, but data suggests bulls will absorb the dip.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: Is AI the exit strategy for miners?
articles.description: Bitcoin miners double down on AI, tokenized RWAs top $43 billion, Ripple strengthens its African payments network and Sam Bankman-Fried loses his appeal.

articles.title: Every fusion startup that has raised over $100M
articles.description: Fusion startups have raised $7.1 billion to date, with the majority of it going to a handful of companies.

articles.title: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?

articles.title: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home
articles.description: Reliance is weaving AI into telecom services used by more than 500 million people.

articles.title: Andrew Tate loses nearly $86,000 longing and shorting Bitcoin
articles.description: Andrew Tate’s Hyperliquid wallet shows over $803,800 in all-time perps losses after repeated crypto WLFI liquidations.

articles.title: Aave survived $8.45B in withdrawals, but risk questions remain
articles.description: Aave handled $8.45 billion in withdrawals without freezing funds, but the episode raised fresh questions about hidden risks in DeFi lending.

articles.title: Bitcoin taps $63K on Juneteenth as July Fed rate-hike odds near 40%
articles.description: Bitcoin price action avoided volatility but failed to bounce from local lows after a hawkish Fed meeting and posturing over Strait of Hormuz control from Iran.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Kalshi in early IPO talks with investment banks: Report
articles.description: The prediction market platform is reportedly exploring a public listing after surpassing $2 billion in annualized revenue as sports contracts face mounting legal scrutiny.

articles.title: Binance’s MiCA fight raises questions over ECB influence
articles.description: Lawyers say MiCA rules do not bar the European Central Bank from communicating with national regulators during the application process, though crypto licensing decisions remain with member states.

articles.title: Ethereum faces core development funding crisis, former contributor warns
articles.description: The warning comes as the Ethereum Foundation reduces spending, adjusts its treasury strategy and undergoes a wave of leadership departures.

articles.title: The CEO of Allbirds’ new AI biz has a plan, but no employees
articles.description: Call it a startup with a sole founder and a very large seed round, but what's next is less clear.

articles.title: GoMining challenges Jack Dorsey's Square with payments system designed around bitcoin
articles.description: GoMining unveiled a software development kit and programmable access for its bitcoin payment protocol GoBTC Pay, allowing merchants to accept BTC for everyday purchases.

articles.title: Binance can serve Philippine traders under SEC framework, BlockShoals says
articles.description: The exchange's Philippine return relies on an SEC sandbox arrangement that BlockShoals says permits trading access without a local VASP license.
